name: make-vibe
description: Expose Makefile targets as MCP tools for building, testing, and running experiments on local or remote HPC systems.

interface.shortDescription: Run Makefile targets through MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: Use make-vibe to expose annotated Makefile targets as MCP tools for reproducible local or remote HPC build, test, and run workflows.
defaultPrompt: Set up make-vibe for this project.
